Term Sheet – Proposed Convertible Notes and Strategic Alliance between Astera Reef Technologies Ltd. (Mainboard, SGX-ST; ticker: ARFZ, placeholder) and Lionwave Ventures Pte. Ltd.
Parties: Astera Reef Technologies Ltd. (UEN: 2019-ARFZ-000; invalid for draft) and Lionwave Ventures Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 2024-LWVP-999; invalid for draft).
Overview: Non-binding subscription of unsecured convertible notes and an option to acquire up to 15% of Coral Metrics Pte. Ltd., a wholly owned subsidiary (no price terms included in draft).
Public status: Heads of terms were announced on SGXNet on 12 Feb 2025; this sheet consolidates already-announced items and process steps.
Regulatory: SGX-ST Listing Manual Rules 703 and 805 compliance; any material information not generally available will be cleansed by announcement prior to definitive signing.
Conditions precedent: Independent valuation, satisfactory due diligence, and no requirement to trigger the Singapore Code on Take-overs and Mergers (no change-of-control).
Use of proceeds: To fund R&D for reef-sensor arrays and general working capital; precise allocation to be confirmed in the circular.
Diligence scope: Buyer access to a virtual data room with redacted contracts, anonymised customer cohorts, and systems logs; no personal emails or direct phone numbers will be shared.
Limited HR sample (for testing payroll integration only): staff code OP‑M12, date of birth 1990‑07‑19, office location Toa Payoh logistics hub, employer Coral Metrics Pte. Ltd., role Group Payroll Analyst, laptop asset tag AT‑7F22, internal sandbox account ID GL‑09871.
PDPA: Only the above quasi-identifiers will be provided under a data processing agreement; no NRIC, passport numbers, or residential addresses will be disclosed.
Securities placeholders: Draft ISIN ZZ0000000000 and internal series code AR‑NOTE‑A (for layout only; not valid identifiers).
Timetable: Target SGX-ST pre-clearance in early Q3 2026 and shareholder EGM within 60–90 days thereafter, subject to regulator feedback.
Disclosure: Announcements to be made via SGXNet; no selective disclosure to analysts or trade press; questions routed to ir@asterareef.example and legal@lionwave.example (role mailboxes).
Interim covenants: No dividends on ordinary shares and no new indebtedness above agreed headroom until completion; exceptions to be negotiated.
Governing law: Singapore; this term sheet is not intended to create legal obligations except for confidentiality, exclusivity (60 days), costs, and applicable SGX-ST undertakings.
